mapper.sql: id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, permission_code, path, component, icon, visible, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0
AND (menu_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR permission_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, permission_code, path, component, icon, visible, status, sort) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{permissionCode}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_menu
parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_type = #{menuType}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
